mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.shadow_id, a.content, a.created_by, e.employee_name AS created_by_name, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM pm_shadow_annotation a LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON a.created_by = e.username WHERE a.shadow_id = #{shadowId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.shadow_id, s.shadow_alias, p.project_name AS target_project_name, a.content, a.created_by, e.employee_name AS created_by_name, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM pm_shadow_annotation a INNER JOIN pm_task_shadow s ON a.shadow_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pm_project p ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON a.created_by = e.username WHERE s.source_task_id = #{sourceTaskId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
